basic_details.job_title: CSIR CFTRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI) Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website [CSIR CFTRI Website]. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR CFTRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged up to 35 years with a Master's Degree in Food Science & Technology, Biotechnology, or Biochemistry are eligible to apply for this Project Associate I position. The online application process for CSIR CFTRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 has started on 11 May 2026 and will remain open unti

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years as on 24-05-2026. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years, OBC: 3 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Food Science & Technology, Master's Degree in Biotechnology, Master's Degree in Biochemistry
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Food Science & Technology/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry from a recognized University.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 25,000/- plus HRA - Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: Rs. 25,000/- plus HRA - Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CFTRI Project Associate – I (PAT-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the CSIR CFTRI Project Associate – I (PAT-I) recruitment is 24th May 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Food Science & Technology, Biotechnology, or Biochemistry from a recognized university to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate – I (PAT-I) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate – I (PAT-I) post is 35 years as of 24th May 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate – I (PAT-I) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 25,000/- plus HRA to Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA, depending on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate – I (PAT-I) post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Associate – I (PAT-I) position in this recruitment drive by CSIR CFTRI.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate – I (PAT-I) recruitment will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview of the eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is contractual in nature, meaning the appointment will be for a fixed period as specified in the project duration.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the CSIR CFTRI located?
faq.answer: CSIR CFTRI is located in Mysuru, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the project?
faq.answer: The project is expected to end by 31st March 2027.
